untranslatable_reason: This signal requires macroeconomic data (interest rates by country, inflation rates, real interest rate differentials) that are not available in the ALLOWED INDICATORS list. The signal operates on cross-country interest rate spreads and real returns, which require external data feeds (central bank rates, inflation indices) not present in the standard OHLCV/technical indicator universe. Additionally, it requires currency pair selection logic and multi-country comparison that cannot be expressed with single-instrument price/volume indicators.
translation_notes: KAUFMAN_DRY_13 is a carry trade strategy fundamentally dependent on macroeconomic data beyond technical analysis. It requires: (1) Interest rate data for multiple countries, (2) Inflation data for real rate calculation, (3) Currency pair selection logic. These inputs are not supported by the allowed indicators (price, moving averages, RSI, ATR, MACD, etc.). To implement this signal, a custom data connector for central bank rates and inflation data would be required.
